== Notes for [[Item:Q113122|Q113122]] ==

N3 D. ERMIGO ALBOAZAR f.º de Alboazar Ramires N2 cazou com D. Dordia Ozores
>4 D. '''Rozendo Ermigues'''

>4 D Egas Hermigues o Bravo c. c; D. Gontinha nos Amaraes

''in: Nobiliário de Famílias de Portugual, de Felgueiras Gayo. Braga, 1941, Tomo 27, p. 143. <http://www.google.com.br/url?sa=t&source=web&cd=5&ved=0CDoQFjAE&url=http%3A%2F%2Fpurl.pt%2F12151%2F2%2Fhg-40115-v%2Fhg-40115-v_item1%2Fhg-40115-v_PDF%2Fhg-40115-v_PDF_01-B-R0300%2Fhg-40115-v_0010_134-148_t01-B-R0300.pdf&rct=j&q=trastamiro%20%20mencia%20dordia&ei=t3P9Te3_HcTngQevsbXeCw&usg=AFQjCNHDVWUFAbEVqXzP9EFnQA34jGa3Vg&sig2=DrM1ZTfRG_8cxvbes-SQEw&cad=rja>
''

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
